hero.label: Apps Labs
hero.title: Your business does not need more tools. It needs the right digital system.
hero.description: Apps Labs builds the websites, stores, SaaS products, portals, apps, and internal systems businesses use to fix messy operations, own more of their stack, and scale on cleaner infrastructure.

services.label: What We Build
services.title: Six build categories. One business outcome.
services.description: We build digital systems that help businesses sell better, operate more cleanly, and own more of what drives growth.
services.commerceDesc: High-performance fronts built to convert, not just look polished.
services.commerceItems: Business websites|Landing pages|Custom stores and checkout flows
services.platformsDesc: Products built to run, scale, and monetize properly.
services.operationsDesc: Clearer operations for teams tired of spreadsheets and patchwork tools.
services.operationsItems: Dashboards|CRMs and lead systems|Order and workflow tools
services.automationDesc: Useful AI and automation tied to real work.
services.contentDesc: Publishing systems built for businesses that grow through content, education, or media.
services.contentItems: Blogs and publishing platforms|Podcast products|Streaming and media libraries
services.experiencesDesc: Customer-facing products beyond the basic website.
services.experiencesItems: Client portals|iOS and Android apps|Mobile web experiences

problems.label: Why Businesses Come To Us
problems.title: Most clients come in with one of these problems.
problems.description: The symptoms change. The pattern does not: messy operations, weak follow-up, slow sales flows, or platforms that no longer fit.
problems.card1Problem: Teams are working across spreadsheets, chats, and disconnected tools.
problems.card1Solution: Dashboards, internal tools, CRMs, and workflow systems that bring the process into one place.
problems.card2Problem: The front end looks fine, but the buying flow is slow, generic, or hard to scale.
problems.card2Solution: Faster sites, stronger product pages, cleaner checkouts, and better conversion structure.
problems.card3Problem: Leads cool off and customer conversations slip because the process depends on memory and manual effort.
problems.card3Solution: Lead systems, follow-up flows, customer portals, and reminders built into the operation.
problems.card4Problem: Shopify, no-code, or template platforms start shaping the business instead of supporting it.
problems.card4Solution: Custom websites, stores, SaaS products, and business platforms built around your model.

projects.label: Selected Projects
projects.title: A few examples of what that looks like in practice.
projects.description: Each build had to make the business cleaner, faster, or stronger.
projects.project1Problem: Sourcing and order handling were messy and manual.
projects.project1Build: A custom dashboard for cleaner visibility and workflow control.
projects.project1Outcome: The operation became easier to manage and easier to trust.
projects.project2Problem: Storage, packing, and delivery were difficult to track across teams.
projects.project2Build: An operations dashboard connecting merchants, warehouse flow, and admin oversight.
projects.project2Outcome: Fulfillment became clearer, faster, and less fragmented.
projects.project2Cta: Build an operations layer like this
projects.project3Problem: The storefront looked acceptable but the buying experience was weak.
projects.project3Build: Fast custom product pages and a cleaner checkout flow.
projects.project3Outcome: The store became a stronger sales engine with a better base for scale.
projects.project3Cta: Build a commerce product like this

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Clients talk about what changed.
testimonials.description: Cleaner operations. Stronger products. Less friction.
testimonials.t1quote: We needed an AI product that could turn a single product photo into landing pages in under 90 seconds. Apps Labs built a serious platform that feels stable, scalable, and ready for real usage.
testimonials.t2quote: Apps Labs built us a custom dashboard that finally connected merchants, ground operations, and admin work in one practical system.

process.label: Process
process.title: Clear, direct, and built to keep momentum.
process.description: Enough strategy to map the right thing. Enough structure to build it well.
process.step1Desc: We start with the bottleneck, business model, or product idea.
process.step2Desc: We define the right version to build first.
process.step3Desc: We shape flows, interfaces, and operating logic.
process.step4Desc: We design and engineer the product with close attention to performance.
process.step5Desc: After launch, we refine and expand as the business grows.

whyUs.label: Why Apps Labs
whyUs.title: We think in systems, not just screens.
whyUs.description: We build around business logic, performance, ownership, and monetization instead of template limitations.
whyUs.point1Desc: We start with how the business runs, not with a layout.
whyUs.point2Desc: Speed and clarity are part of the product, not polish added later.
whyUs.point3Desc: We do not force serious businesses into weak-fit tools.
whyUs.point4Desc: The result can support operations, customers, subscriptions, or resellable software.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: The questions that matter before we start.
faq.q1: What kinds of projects do you take on?
faq.a1: Serious websites, stores, SaaS products, portals, apps, internal tools, AI systems, and subscription products.
faq.q2: Do you only build e-commerce stores?
faq.a2: No. Commerce is one part of the work. We also build SaaS, internal tools, AI products, apps, portals, and media platforms.
faq.q3: Can you build SaaS products, AI tools, apps, and internal systems?
faq.a3: Yes. That is a core part of the studio.
faq.q4: Do you build iOS and Android apps too?
faq.a4: Yes. We build web, mobile web, iOS, and Android products when the workflow needs them.
faq.q5: Can you build something we use internally and also sell externally?
faq.a5: Yes. Many strong builds start as internal tools and later become subscription or white-label products.
faq.q6: Do you work with early-stage ideas?
faq.a6: Yes, if the business case is real and the scope can be shaped properly.
faq.q7: Can you replace Shopify, no-code, or another rigid system?
faq.a7: Yes. We do that when the current stack starts limiting ownership, logic, or growth.
faq.q8: How do you scope and price projects?
faq.a8: We review the business context, define the right version to build, then scope and price around real complexity. Strategy, design, development, and bilingual execution are handled together.

contact.label: Start the conversation
contact.title: Book a strategy call for the right build.
contact.description: Website, store, SaaS product, portal, internal tool, AI workflow, app, or platform. If the business case is real, we can map the right system.
contact.clientTypeValue: Founders, operators, merchants, and companies with a real bottleneck or product goal.
contact.projectTypeValue: Websites, stores, SaaS, dashboards, portals, internal tools, apps, and AI systems.
contact.formIntro: Share the bottleneck or product goal. We'll review it before the call.
contact.formWhatsAppHint: Include country code if you want meeting confirmation there.
contact.formMessage: What are you trying to build, fix, or replace?
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us what exists now, where it breaks, and what a stronger result should look like.
contact.formHint: Best submissions mention the problem, the current setup, and the outcome you want.
contact.formReassurance: We take on a limited number of projects at a time.
contact.formSuccess: Your details are in. We'll review them and send the meeting details by email.
contact.formProjectOptions: Premium website|Store or commerce system|SaaS or subscription product|Dashboard or internal tool|Client portal or workflow system|AI product or automation|Mobile app|Content or media platform|Existing product rebuild|Other
contact.modalTitle: Select a time for your call
contact.modalSubtitle: Pick a 30-minute slot and we'll use it to clarify the project and next step.

footer.description: We build digital systems for businesses that need cleaner operations, stronger ownership, and better growth infrastructure.
